name: Lavender & Rose Clay
description: Calming lavender essential oil with pink rose clay. Perfect for sensitive and dry skin.

name: Activated Charcoal & Neem
description: Deep cleansing charcoal with antibacterial neem. Ideal for oily and acne-prone skin.

name: Turmeric & Sandalwood
description: Traditional turmeric with grounding sandalwood. Brightens and evens skin tone naturally.

name: Honey & Oatmeal
description: Raw honey and colloidal oatmeal for a creamy, nourishing lather. Great for all skin types.

name: Coffee & Cocoa Butter
description: Ground coffee for gentle exfoliation, with rich cocoa butter to leave skin silky smooth.

name: Eucalyptus & Spearmint
description: A cooling, invigorating bar with eucalyptus and spearmint essential oils. Perfect morning soap.

name: Rosemary & Mint
description: Stimulates the scalp with rosemary and peppermint. Reduces hair fall and promotes growth.

name: Amla & Shikakai
description: Ancient Indian hair care with amla and shikakai. Cleanses gently while nourishing the scalp.

name: Glow & Go Face Set
description: A curated trio of our best face soaps — Lavender Rose, Charcoal Neem & Turmeric Sandalwood. Beautifully boxed.

name: Pamper Me Body Set
description: Three indulgent body soaps — Honey Oatmeal, Coffee Cocoa & Eucalyptus Spearmint. Perfect gifting.
